creationSteps.label: Identity
creationSteps.description: Start by recording the basics: who is your character, who is playing them, and where are they in their adventuring career?

fields.label: Experience Points
fields.notes: Total XP earned. Milestone leveling games may leave this blank.

options.label: Acolyte
options.description: You have spent your life in service to a temple. Skill Proficiencies: Insight, Religion. Languages: Two of your choice. Feat: Magic Initiate (Cleric).

options.label: Artisan
options.description: You are trained in a particular artisan's craft. Skill Proficiencies: Investigation, Persuasion. Tool Proficiency: One Artisan's Tools of your choice. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Crafter.

options.label: Charlatan
options.description: You always had a way with people, bending the truth to your advantage. Skill Proficiencies: Deception, Sleight of Hand. Tool Proficiency: Forgery Kit. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Skilled.

options.label: Criminal
options.description: You are an experienced criminal with a history of breaking the law. Skill Proficiencies: Sleight of Hand, Stealth. Tool Proficiency: Thieves' Tools. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Alert.

options.label: Entertainer
options.description: You thrive in front of an audience. Skill Proficiencies: Acrobatics, Performance. Tool Proficiency: Musical Instrument of your choice. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Musician.

options.label: Farmer
options.description: You grew up close to the land, learning the ways of agriculture and animal husbandry. Skill Proficiencies: Animal Handling, Nature. Tool Proficiency: Carpenter's Tools. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Tough.

options.label: Guard
options.description: You served as a guard, patrol officer, or soldier in a town or city. Skill Proficiencies: Athletics, Perception. Tool Proficiency: Gaming Set of your choice. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Alert.

options.label: Guide
options.description: You grew up in the wilderness, learning to survive far from civilization. Skill Proficiencies: Stealth, Survival. Tool Proficiency: Cartographer's Tools. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Musician.

options.label: Hermit
options.description: You lived in seclusion for a long period of time. Skill Proficiencies: Medicine, Religion. Tool Proficiency: Herbalism Kit. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Magic Initiate (Druid).

options.label: Merchant
options.description: You worked in commerce, buying and selling goods across the land. Skill Proficiencies: Animal Handling, Persuasion. Tool Proficiency: Navigator's Tools. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Lucky.

options.label: Noble
options.description: You understand wealth, power, and privilege. Skill Proficiencies: History, Persuasion. Tool Proficiency: Gaming Set of your choice. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Skilled.

options.label: Sailor
options.description: You sailed on a seagoing vessel for years. Skill Proficiencies: Acrobatics, Perception. Tool Proficiency: Navigator's Tools. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Tavern Brawler.

options.label: Sage
options.description: You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse. Skill Proficiencies: Arcana, History. Languages: Two of your choice. Feat: Magic Initiate (Wizard).

options.label: Scribe
options.description: You spent years as a clerk or copyist. Skill Proficiencies: Investigation, Perception. Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Skilled.

options.label: Soldier
options.description: War has been your life for as long as you care to remember. Skill Proficiencies: Athletics, Intimidation. Tool Proficiency: Gaming Set of your choice. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Savage Attacker.

options.label: Wayfarer
options.description: You grew up on the road, traveling from place to place without a fixed home. Skill Proficiencies: Insight, Stealth. Tool Proficiency: Thieves' Tools. Languages: One of your choice. Feat: Lucky.

creationSteps.label: Species
creationSteps.description: Choose your character's species. Each species grants unique traits that persist throughout your adventuring career. Source: PHB 2024.

options.label: Aasimar
options.description: Blessed with a touch of the divine, aasimar carry a spark of celestial power. Traits: Darkvision 60 ft., Celestial Resistance (necrotic and radiant), Healing Hands, Light Bearer. At level 3 choose a Transformation: Heavenly Wings, Inner Radiance, or Necrotic Shroud.

options.label: Dragonborn
options.description: Born of dragon lineage, dragonborn carry draconic gifts. Choose an Ancestor from the 10 dragon types. Traits: Draconic Ancestry (damage type), Breath Weapon (Dex save, scales with level), Damage Resistance (matching ancestry), Darkvision 60 ft.

options.label: Dwarf
options.description: Stout and sturdy denizens of mountain halls and subterranean cities. Traits: Darkvision 120 ft., Dwarven Resilience (poison resistance and Adv. on poison saves), Dwarven Toughness (+1 HP per level), Stonecunning (Tremorsense 60 ft. for 10 min via Bonus Action).

options.label: Elf
options.description: Long-lived and magical, elves embody grace and ancient power. Choose a lineage: Drow, High Elf, or Wood Elf. Traits: Darkvision 60 ft., Fey Ancestry (Adv. vs. Charmed, immune to magic sleep), Keen Senses (Perception proficiency), Trance (rest in 4 hours), Lineage trait.

options.label: Gnome
options.description: Small and clever, gnomes delight in invention and magic. Choose a lineage: Forest Gnome or Rock Gnome. Traits: Darkvision 60 ft., Gnomish Cunning (Adv. on Int/Wis/Cha saves vs. magic), Lineage trait.

options.label: Goliath
options.description: Towering wanderers of mountain peaks, goliaths are imbued with elemental power. Choose a Giant Ancestor (Cloud, Fire, Frost, Hill, Stone, or Storm). Traits: Large Form (can be Large size, once per long rest), Powerful Build (counts as one size larger for carry), Giant Ancestry power.

options.label: Halfling
options.description: Small in stature but great in spirit, halflings exhibit remarkable luck. Traits: Lucky (reroll 1s on attack rolls, ability checks, saves), Brave (Adv. on saves vs. Frightened), Halfling Nimbleness (move through larger creatures' spaces), Naturally Stealthy (can hide behind larger creatures).

options.label: Human
options.description: Versatile and ambitious, humans are the most widespread species in many worlds. Traits: Resourceful (Heroic Inspiration after long rest), Skillful (one skill proficiency), Versatile (one Origin feat).

options.label: Orc
options.description: Resilient and powerful warriors shaped by the divine forge of Gruumsh. Traits: Darkvision 120 ft., Adrenaline Rush (Bonus Action Dash, gain temp HP equal to proficiency bonus; usable = proficiency bonus / long rest), Relentless Endurance (drop to 1 HP instead of 0, once per long rest), Powerful Build.

options.label: Tiefling
options.description: Carrying infernal heritage, tieflings wield fiendish gifts. Choose a Fiendish Legacy: Abyssal, Chthonic, or Infernal. Traits: Darkvision 60 ft., Fiendish Legacy (resistance and spells by legacy type), Otherworldly Presence (Thaumaturgy cantrip).

creationSteps.label: Class
creationSteps.description: Choose your character's class and, at level 3 or above, your subclass. Your class defines your primary combat style, hit points, and abilities.

options.label: Barbarian
options.description: A fierce warrior who channels primal fury. Hit Die: d12. Primary Ability: Strength. Armor: Light, Medium, Shields. Weapons: Simple, Martial. Saving Throws: Strength, Constitution.

options.label: Bard
options.description: An inspiring performer whose magic flows from artistic ability. Hit Die: d8. Primary Ability: Charisma. Armor: Light. Weapons: Simple. Saving Throws: Dexterity, Charisma.

options.label: Cleric
options.description: A priestly champion who wields divine power in service of a deity. Hit Die: d8. Primary Ability: Wisdom. Armor: Light, Medium, Shields. Weapons: Simple. Saving Throws: Wisdom, Charisma.

options.label: Druid
options.description: A priest of the Old Faith who wields the primal magic of nature. Hit Die: d8. Primary Ability: Wisdom. Armor: Light, Medium (non-metal), Shields (non-metal). Weapons: Simple (non-metal). Saving Throws: Intelligence, Wisdom.

options.label: Fighter
options.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor. Hit Die: d10. Primary Ability: Strength or Dexterity. Armor: All, Shields. Weapons: Simple, Martial. Saving Throws: Strength, Constitution.

options.label: Monk
options.description: A master of martial arts who harnesses the power of ki. Hit Die: d8. Primary Ability: Dexterity and Wisdom. Armor: None. Weapons: Simple, Shortswords. Saving Throws: Strength, Dexterity.

options.label: Paladin
options.description: A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath. Hit Die: d10. Primary Ability: Strength and Charisma. Armor: All, Shields. Weapons: Simple, Martial. Saving Throws: Wisdom, Charisma.

options.label: Ranger
options.description: A warrior who combats threats at the edges of civilization. Hit Die: d10. Primary Ability: Dexterity and Wisdom. Armor: Light, Medium, Shields. Weapons: Simple, Martial. Saving Throws: Strength, Dexterity.

options.label: Rogue
options.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles. Hit Die: d8. Primary Ability: Dexterity. Armor: Light. Weapons: Simple, Hand Crossbow, Longsword, Rapier, Shortsword. Saving Throws: Dexterity, Intelligence.

options.label: Sorcerer
options.description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline. Hit Die: d6. Primary Ability: Charisma. Armor: None. Weapons: Simple. Saving Throws: Constitution, Charisma.

options.label: Warlock
options.description: A wielder of magic derived from a bargain with an extraplanar entity. Hit Die: d8. Primary Ability: Charisma. Armor: Light. Weapons: Simple. Saving Throws: Wisdom, Charisma.

options.label: Wizard
options.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of spellcasting. Hit Die: d6. Primary Ability: Intelligence. Armor: None. Weapons: Simple. Saving Throws: Intelligence, Wisdom.

options.label: Artificer
options.description: A master of invention who uses magical items and infusions to enhance their abilities. Hit Die: d8. Primary Ability: Intelligence. Armor: Light, Medium, Shields. Weapons: Simple. Saving Throws: Constitution, Intelligence.

fields.label: Subclass
fields.notes: Available at level 3 (or level 1 for Cleric, Sorcerer, Warlock in 2024 PHB). List covers all 2024 PHB subclasses per class.

options.label: Barbarian: Path of the Berserker
options.description: Channel rage into ferocity, entering a Frenzy that allows extra attacks but risks exhaustion.

options.label: Barbarian: Path of the Totem Warrior
options.description: Draw on the spirit of an animal totem—Bear, Eagle, Elk, Tiger, or Wolf—for primal boons.

options.label: Barbarian: Path of the Wild Heart
options.description: Commune with nature to gain bestial aspects and speak with animals.

options.label: Barbarian: Path of the World Tree
options.description: Draw on the power of Yggdrasil—the cosmic World Tree—to teleport and protect allies.

options.label: Barbarian: Path of the Zealot
options.description: Channel divine fury; divine strikes deal extra radiant or necrotic damage and resist death.

options.label: Bard: College of Dance
options.description: Blend combat with interpretive dance and Bardic Inspiration into fluid movement.

options.label: Bard: College of Glamour
options.description: Wield the beguiling magic of the Feywild to enthrall and manipulate.

options.label: Bard: College of Lore
options.description: Master a vast breadth of knowledge; acquire additional proficiencies and magical secrets.

options.label: Bard: College of Valor
options.description: Inspire armies on the battlefield; gain medium armor, shields, and martial weapons.

options.label: Cleric: Life Domain
options.description: Focus on vitality and healing; maximize healing spells and gain heavy armor proficiency.

options.label: Cleric: Light Domain
options.description: Serve a deity of light and truth; wield radiant fire to burn foes and protect allies.

options.label: Cleric: Trickery Domain
options.description: Channel the power of deception; create duplicates and boost stealth.

options.label: Cleric: War Domain
options.description: Serve a war deity; martial strikes and extra attacks make you a fierce combatant.

options.label: Cleric: Knowledge Domain
options.description: Serve a deity of wisdom; gain proficiencies and read thoughts.

options.label: Cleric: Nature Domain
options.description: Serve a deity of nature; channel the wild through charm and resistance.

options.label: Cleric: Tempest Domain
options.description: Command storms and lightning; maximize thunder and lightning damage.

options.label: Druid: Circle of the Land
options.description: Draw power from a specific terrain; recover spell slots and gain bonus spells by biome.

options.label: Druid: Circle of the Moon
options.description: Transform into powerful beasts including elementals; combat-focused Wild Shape.

options.label: Druid: Circle of the Sea
options.description: Channel the power of tides and storms; wield thunder and cold in your Wild Shape.

options.label: Druid: Circle of Stars
options.description: Chart the stars to gain celestial forms and healing power.

options.label: Fighter: Battle Master
options.description: Learn Combat Maneuvers powered by Superiority Dice to control the battlefield.

options.label: Fighter: Champion
options.description: Hone your martial skill to athletic perfection; extend critical hit range.

options.label: Fighter: Eldritch Knight
options.description: Study wizard magic to augment combat with spells.

options.label: Fighter: Psi Warrior
options.description: Augment physical might with psionic power—telekinetic shoves and psionic shields.

options.label: Monk: Warrior of Mercy
options.description: Heal allies and inflict debilitating conditions through precise strikes.

options.label: Monk: Warrior of the Open Hand
options.description: Master unarmed combat; knock back, prone, and deny reactions with Open Hand Technique.

options.label: Monk: Warrior of Shadow
options.description: Channel ki into shadow magic; cast darkness and teleport through shadows.

options.label: Monk: Warrior of the Four Elements
options.description: Bend the four classical elements; spend ki to cast elemental spells.

options.label: Paladin: Oath of Devotion
options.description: Uphold the ideals of honor and chivalry; radiant strikes and protection auras.

options.label: Paladin: Oath of Glory
options.description: Inspire companions to heroic deeds; gain athleticism and inspire allied saves.

options.label: Paladin: Oath of the Ancients
options.description: Protect the light and life of the world; nature spells and Aura of Warding.

options.label: Paladin: Oath of Vengeance
options.description: Punish evil doers with relentless pursuit; Hold and banish foes.

options.label: Ranger: Beast Master
options.description: Form an extraordinary bond with a beast companion that fights beside you.

options.label: Ranger: Fey Wanderer
options.description: Carry the beguiling and terrifying might of the Feywild within you.

options.label: Ranger: Gloom Stalker
options.description: Master the darkness; bonus initiative, invisible to darkvision, fear strike.

options.label: Ranger: Hunter
options.description: Learn specialized Hunter's Prey and Defensive Tactics to dispatch any quarry.

options.label: Rogue: Arcane Trickster
options.description: Study wizard magic to augment roguish skills with enchantment and illusion.

options.label: Rogue: Assassin
options.description: Perfect the art of ambush and disguise; automatically score critical hit vs. surprised foes.

options.label: Rogue: Soulknife
options.description: Hone a psychic blade from the power of your mind; teleport and read thoughts.

options.label: Rogue: Thief
options.description: Excel at stealth, sleight of hand, and the use of magic items.

options.label: Sorcerer: Aberrant Mind
options.description: An alien influence has warped your magic; gain psionic spells and telepathy.

options.label: Sorcerer: Clockwork Soul
options.description: Draw on forces of order from Mechanus; cancel advantage/disadvantage and boost saves.

options.label: Sorcerer: Draconic Bloodline
options.description: Draw on draconic heritage for elemental affinity, natural armor, and dragon wings.

options.label: Sorcerer: Wild Magic
options.description: Unpredictable surges of magic; Wild Magic Surge table and Bend Luck.

options.label: Warlock: Archfey Patron
options.description: Bargain with a lord of the Feywild for beguiling and illusory power.

options.label: Warlock: Fiend Patron
options.description: Serve a powerful devil or demon for destructive power and dark resilience.

options.label: Warlock: Great Old One Patron
options.description: Draw power from an alien entity of the Far Realm; telepathy and eldritch blasts.

options.label: Warlock: Celestial Patron
options.description: Make a pact with a celestial being; channel radiant power to heal and harm.

options.label: Wizard: School of Abjuration
options.description: Master protective magic; strengthen abjuration spells and build arcane ward.

options.label: Wizard: School of Conjuration
options.description: Master summoning and teleportation magic; conjure elements and creatures.

options.label: Wizard: School of Divination
options.description: Uncover secrets and futures; use Portent dice to replace any d20 roll.

options.label: Wizard: School of Enchantment
options.description: Master mind-affecting magic; split Hypnotic Gaze and bend wills.

options.label: Wizard: School of Evocation
options.description: Master destructive magic; sculpt spells to protect allies from blast damage.

options.label: Wizard: School of Illusion
options.description: Master illusion magic; make illusions partially real and animate them.

options.label: Artificer: Alchemist
options.description: Create alchemical substances for healing and harm; experimental elixirs.

options.label: Artificer: Armorer
options.description: Craft and integrate magical armor; choose Guardian or Infiltrator mode.

options.label: Artificer: Artillerist
options.description: Construct Eldritch Cannon to deal force, fire, or lightning damage.

options.label: Artificer: Battle Smith
options.description: Craft a Steel Defender companion; use Intelligence for weapon attacks.

fields.label: Hit Die
fields.notes: Automatically set from the class selection. Barbarian=d12, Fighter/Paladin/Ranger=d10, most others=d8, Sorcerer/Wizard=d6.

creationSteps.label: Ability Scores
creationSteps.description: Determine your six ability scores using your chosen method: Roll (4d6 drop lowest), Standard Array (15/14/13/12/10/8), or Point Buy (27 points, scores 8–15). Scores represent your raw potential before species and background bonuses.

options.label: Standard Array (15/14/13/12/10/8)
options.description: Assign the set values 15, 14, 13, 12, 10, and 8 to your six abilities in any order.

options.label: Point Buy (27 points)
options.description: Spend 27 points to set scores from 8 to 15. Each score has a cost: 8=0, 9=1, 10=2, 11=3, 12=4, 13=5, 14=7, 15=9.

options.label: Roll (4d6 drop lowest)
options.description: Roll 4d6 and drop the lowest die for each score. Accept the results or ask your DM about re-rolling.

fields.label: Strength
fields.notes: Roll 4d6kh3 when using Roll method. For Standard Array or Point Buy, type value directly. Max 20 before magical enhancement.

fields.label: STR Modifier
fields.notes: floor((strength - 10) / 2)

creationSteps.label: Skills & Proficiencies
creationSteps.description: Mark skill and saving throw proficiencies granted by your class and background. Totals are calculated as ability modifier + proficiency bonus (if proficient).

fields.label: Acrobatics Proficiency
fields.notes: DEX-based skill.

fields.label: Animal Handling Proficiency
fields.notes: WIS-based skill.

fields.label: Arcana Proficiency
fields.notes: INT-based skill.

fields.label: Athletics Proficiency
fields.notes: STR-based skill.

fields.label: Deception Proficiency
fields.notes: CHA-based skill.

fields.label: History Proficiency
fields.notes: INT-based skill.

fields.label: Insight Proficiency
fields.notes: WIS-based skill.

fields.label: Intimidation Proficiency
fields.notes: CHA-based skill.

fields.label: Investigation Proficiency
fields.notes: INT-based skill.

fields.label: Medicine Proficiency
fields.notes: WIS-based skill.

fields.label: Nature Proficiency
fields.notes: INT-based skill.

fields.label: Perception Proficiency
fields.notes: WIS-based skill.

fields.label: Performance Proficiency
fields.notes: CHA-based skill.

fields.label: Persuasion Proficiency
fields.notes: CHA-based skill.

fields.label: Religion Proficiency
fields.notes: INT-based skill.

fields.label: Sleight of Hand Proficiency
fields.notes: DEX-based skill.

fields.label: Stealth Proficiency
fields.notes: DEX-based skill.

fields.label: Survival Proficiency
fields.notes: WIS-based skill.

fields.label: Strength Save Proficiency
fields.notes: Granted by class (Barbarian, Fighter). PHB 2024.

creationSteps.label: Combat
creationSteps.description: Record your combat statistics. Armor Class, Speed, and Hit Points define your survivability in battle.

fields.label: Armor Class
fields.notes: Base AC = 10 + DEX mod (unarmored). Armor changes the base; some class features (Barbarian Unarmored Defense, Monk Unarmored Defense) use different formulas.

fields.label: Initiative
fields.notes: Initiative = DEX modifier by default. PHB 2024 p.22. The Alert feat adds +5.

fields.label: Speed
fields.notes: Walking speed in feet. Most species have 30 ft. Dwarves have 25 ft. Racial or class features may alter this.

fields.label: Maximum Hit Points
fields.notes: Level 1: hit die max + CON mod. Each subsequent level: hit die average (rounded up) + CON mod. PHB 2024 p.15.

fields.label: Hit Dice
fields.notes: Total hit dice pool, e.g. '5d10' for a level 5 Fighter. Matches character level × hit die type.

fields.label: Death Save Success 3
fields.notes: Three successes stabilize the character.

fields.label: Death Save Failure 3
fields.notes: Three failures result in death. PHB 2024 p.23.

creationSteps.label: Equipment
creationSteps.description: Record your starting equipment granted by your class and background, plus any additional gear purchased with starting gold.

fields.label: Electrum Pieces (EP)
fields.notes: Electrum is worth 5 SP. Rarely used in most campaigns.

options.label: None
options.description: No armor worn. AC = 10 + DEX modifier (or class Unarmored Defense).

options.label: Light
options.description: Light Armor: AC = armor base + DEX modifier. Includes Padded (11), Leather (11), Studded Leather (12).

options.label: Medium
options.description: Medium Armor: AC = armor base + DEX modifier (max +2). Includes Hide (12), Chain Shirt (13), Scale Mail (14), Breastplate (14), Half Plate (15).

options.label: Heavy
options.description: Heavy Armor: AC = armor base, no DEX modifier. Includes Ring Mail (14), Chain Mail (16), Splint (17), Plate (18). Requires STR 13–15 depending on type.

options.label: Shield
options.description: Shield adds +2 to AC. Can be combined with any armor type. Requires one hand.

fields.label: Equipment & Gear
fields.placeholder: List all equipment, tools, and adventuring gear...
fields.notes: Free-text equipment list. Starting equipment is granted by class and background per PHB 2024.

creationSteps.label: Spellcasting
creationSteps.description: Record your spellcasting information if your class grants spells. Non-spellcasting classes may leave this section blank.

fields.label: Spellcasting Class
fields.notes: The class that grants your spellcasting. Multi-classed characters may have multiple; record primary here.

fields.label: Spellcasting Ability

options.label: Intelligence
options.description: Used by Artificer, Wizard, Eldritch Knight, Arcane Trickster.

options.label: Wisdom
options.description: Used by Cleric, Druid, Ranger.

options.label: Charisma
options.description: Used by Bard, Paladin, Sorcerer, Warlock.

fields.notes: Determines which ability modifier is added to Spell Save DC and Spell Attack Bonus.

fields.label: Spell Save DC
fields.notes: 8 + proficiency bonus + spellcasting ability modifier. PHB 2024 p.232.

fields.label: Spell Attack Bonus
fields.notes: Proficiency bonus + spellcasting ability modifier. PHB 2024 p.232.

fields.label: 1st-Level Spell Slots
fields.notes: Number of 1st-level spell slots available. Varies by class and level.

fields.label: Cantrips Known
fields.notes: Cantrips do not consume spell slots.

fields.label: 5th-Level Spells
fields.placeholder: Cone of Cold, Wall of Force...

creationSteps.label: Background & Features
creationSteps.description: Record your background feature, personality traits, ideals, bonds, and flaws. The 2024 PHB grants one background feat and language proficiencies.

fields.label: Background Feature
fields.notes: Each 2024 PHB background grants a feature (e.g., Acolyte grants Shelter of the Faithful).

fields.label: Personality Traits
fields.placeholder: I idolize a particular hero of my faith and constantly refer to that person's deeds and example...

fields.label: Ideals
fields.placeholder: Tradition. The ancient traditions of worship and sacrifice must be preserved and upheld...

fields.label: Bonds
fields.placeholder: I would die to recover an ancient relic of my faith that was lost long ago...

fields.label: Flaws
fields.placeholder: I judge others harshly, and myself even more severely...

fields.label: Background Feat
fields.notes: In the 2024 PHB, each background grants one specific Origin feat. Record it here.

fields.label: Languages Known
fields.notes: All characters know Common plus additional languages from species and background.

fields.label: Tool Proficiencies
fields.notes: Tool proficiencies from class, background, and species.

fields.label: Other Proficiencies
fields.notes: Any remaining proficiencies not captured elsewhere (gaming sets, vehicles, etc.).

creationSteps.label: Notes
creationSteps.description: Record additional information about your character's history, allies, and treasures.

fields.label: Character Backstory
fields.placeholder: Describe your character's history and origins...

fields.label: Allies & Organizations
fields.placeholder: The Harpers, The Zhentarim, your adventuring party...

fields.label: Additional Features & Traits
fields.placeholder: Class features, species traits, racial abilities not captured elsewhere...

fields.label: Treasure
fields.placeholder: Magic items, art objects, gems, quest items...

fields.label: Miscellaneous Notes
fields.placeholder: Session notes, reminders, NPC names, quest hooks...
